positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial guardian figure emerging from a cosmic nebula. The figure should be highly dynamic, utilizing clean, flowing lines and negative space. Incorporate elements of ancient myth (like winged silhouettes and celestial geometry) mixed with abstract space art. The palette must feature deep indigo, vibrant nebula purples, glowing gold accents, and contrasting black voids, designed to pop on fabric. Composition must be centralized and symmetric, ideal for a chest print. Emphasize a strong, contrasting silhouette against a detailed but manageable background, maintaining perfect vector-art quality and high contrast. Intricate detailing should be kept within the main subject for optimal print clarity.
negative: low resolution, fuzzy, blurry, bad anatomy, text, logo, watermark, signature, amateur, dirty, grain, cropped, artifacts, extra limbs, malformed, boring, flat lighting
